description_long: This basketball features a distinctive two-tone color scheme, with cream-colored panels alternating with deep blue panels, separated by orange seams. The surface is covered in a fine, pebbled texture typical of basketballs, providing enhanced grip for handling and play. The orange seams are slightly raised, creating a tactile boundary between the panels and contributing to the ball's classic segmented appearance. The ball appears to be made of synthetic rubber or composite leather, with an air-filled interior that gives it a lightweight, bouncy quality. There are no visible brand logos, text, or additional markings on the surface. The ball is clean and shows no signs of wear, scuffing, or graffiti.
description: A two-tone basketball with cream and blue panels divided by orange seams, featuring a pebbled, grippy surface and no visible branding or wear.
description_view_0: The basketball is shown with three cream panels bordered by orange seams, with blue panels visible on the sides.
description_view_1: This view highlights the blue panels dominating the visible surface, with a single orange seam running horizontally and cream panels only partially visible at the top.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, this view displays the cream panels bordered by orange seams, with blue panels on the sides.
description_view_3: This view mirrors view 1, showing mostly blue panels with a horizontal orange seam and a small portion of cream panels at the top.
attribute_panel_pattern: Eight-panel design with alternating cream and blue panels, separated by orange seams in a traditional basketball arrangement.
